items.text: Hi Marcus, this is a reminder that the required lab safety training is on Thursday, October 12, at 3:00 PM in Room 118 of Carver Hall. Please bring the $5 materials fee in cash. You will not be allowed into the lab until this session is complete. Thanks, Dr. Reyes

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Marcus bring to the session?
questions.explanation: The email asks Marcus to bring the $5 materials fee in cash.

questions.stem: According to the email, when does the training take place?
questions.explanation: The training is scheduled for Thursday, October 12, at 3:00 PM, which is Thursday afternoon.

items.text: So excited that the campus community garden is finally open for spring! Come by anytime between 8 AM and 6 PM on weekdays. The gate near Lawson Hall is unlocked, and volunteers can grab free seed packets over at the tool shed. See you there!

questions.stem: According to the post, when is the garden open on weekdays?
questions.explanation: The post says to come by anytime between 8 AM and 6 PM on weekdays.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the volunteers?

options.A: They must pay for seed packets
options.B: They work only on the weekends
options.C: They are required to bring their own tools
options.D: They can obtain seeds at no cost

questions.explanation: Volunteers can grab free seed packets, so they can obtain seeds at no cost.

items.text: Notice: All unclaimed items currently held in the Student Center lost-and-found will be donated to charity after Friday, November 3. Owners must present a photo ID at the front desk between 9 AM and 5 PM to reclaim their belongings. Items are not stored beyond this date.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what happens to unclaimed items after November 3?
questions.explanation: The notice states unclaimed items will be donated to charity after November 3.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who want to reclaim an item?

options.A: They may collect it at any hour
options.B: They should act before Friday, November 3
options.C: They need to bring a written receipt
options.D: They must pay a small storage fee

questions.explanation: Since items are donated after November 3 and not stored beyond that date, students should reclaim them before then.

items.text: Notice: If a vending machine on the third floor of Merrill Library fails to dispense your item, refunds of up to $2.00 are available at the circulation desk. Please report the machine number and the date of the problem. Refund requests are processed Monday through Friday only.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is the maximum refund available?
questions.explanation: The notice states refunds of up to $2.00 are available.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what information must be reported?

options.A: The machine number and the date

questions.explanation: The notice asks the reader to report the machine number and the date of the problem.
